diagnostic.help: remove one declaration or make both timer CEL values identical
diagnostic.message: conflicting timer CEL facts for transition [on_tick]

related.message: first timer CEL was declared here

source.text:
net cadence_tick_conflicting_timer_cel

(tick_latch) -tick_latch-> [on_tick] -tick_latch-> (tick_latch)
@tick_clock: (clock) -clock->? [on_tick]
[on_tick] handler "on_tick@cadence"
[on_tick] timer clock (clock) cel "clock.now >= 300"
[on_tick] timer clock (clock) cel "clock.now >= 600"
